name: San Cristobal Mining Inc.
description: San Cristobal Mining Inc. is a private mining company incorporated under the laws of British Columbia, Canada. The company holds a 100% interest in Minera San Cristóbal S.A., which operates one of the world’s largest open-pit silver, zinc, and lead mining operations located in the Potosí Department of Bolivia. With a state-of-the-art processing facility and a commitment to sustainable mining practices, the company focuses on operational efficiency and the development of high-quality assets to become a leading global silver producer while delivering long-term benefits to its stakeholders and local communities.
